mnemonics: SQL Squirrel Lives On Tables Quickly Retrieving Information Now
Keep Strictly Linked Orphaned Tables With Joined Queries Revisited Inside Now
keyPoints: Using joins to combine data from multiple tables
Subqueries to get data from another query
Using IN and NOT IN for multiple value comparisons
Using EXISTS and IN for checking if any rows match
Using GROUP BY and HAVING for aggregating data
Using ORDER BY and LIMIT for sorting and pagination
